finalized_plan.description: Note the group composition and roles: one tank, one healer, and three DPS
Identify from WoW lore which class naturally serves as a holy‐casting tank – this points to the Paladin
Identify the class that provides holy spells for healing – this points to the Priest
From the DPS clues, single out the class with a bear form (used when “a bear is attacking the boss”) – this is the Druid
Recognize the unique “Metamorphosis” ability as belonging exclusively to Demon Hunters – assign the Demon Hunter to a DPS slot
Determine which DPS remaining class is associated with elemental “ice” and “fire” magic – that is the Mage (using its frost and fire specializations)

Verify that the armor types match: Paladin (plate), Mage and Priest (cloth) and the remaining two (Druid and Demon Hunter) typically wearing leather; thus the “two plate, two cloth” count is satisfied by the Paladin plus one other plate not present, meaning the non‐plate DPS are not using plate armor
Compile the deduced five unique classes: Demon Hunter, Druid, Mage, Paladin, and Priest
Arrange these class names in alphabetical order, separated by commas

root_cause_reasoning: The agent failed to use search tools to verify critical game data (items, skill attributes, expansion timelines), instead relying entirely on its own potentially outdated or incorrect knowledge
